case_title: HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SF VS. IRMA GENOVEZ

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE ELAN LAMABERT FILED BY HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SF

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-10-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-10-2013 BY JUDGE PRO TEM ELAN C. LAMBERT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY JOSEPH A. QUARTELL--COLLECTIONS SUPEVISOR. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ELAN C. LAMBERT. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SF AS TO DEFENDANT GENOVEZ, IRMA AKA: IRMA GENOVES LAINEZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-10-2013 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $50.46 SERVED AUG-09-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SF
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SF
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-10-2013 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GENOVEZ, IRMA AKA: IRMA GENOVES LAINEZ $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.46 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,050.46 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
